originalTitle: A year of Walmart Plus is half off ahead of Prime Day
summary: Do you often find yourself shopping at the big blue, or perhaps you’re just looking for an alternative to Amazon? Either way, Walmart is currently offering a year of its Walmart Plus subscription for $49, which typically costs $98. The membership includes perks like free delivery on orders over $35, free next-day and two-day shipping […]
content: Do you often find yourself shopping at the big blue, or perhaps you’re just looking for an alternative to Amazon? Either way, Walmart is currently offering a year of its Walmart Plus subscription for $49, which typically costs $98. The membership includes perks like free delivery on orders over $35, free next-day and two-day shipping from Walmart.com when available, and free home pickup for returns. Importantly, it also grants you early access to sales, including the upcoming Walmart Deals starting on June 22nd that coincide with Prime Day 2026. [Product: Walmart Plus | https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fplus] In addition to the aforementioned shopping perks, the subscription bundles in a handful of other offers and memberships. For instance, you can choose from either ad-supported Paramount Plus or Peacock, with the option to switch every 90 days. You’ll also get a Pawp membership for remote veterinary care, discounts on gas at Walmart and Sam’s Club, and even a free Whopper with any purchase from Burger King every three months.
chineseTitle: 会员日前沃尔玛 Plus 一年半价
chineseSummary: 您是否经常在蓝色巨人购物，或者您只是在寻找亚马逊以外的替代品？不管怎样，沃尔玛目前提供一年的 Walmart Plus 订阅服务，价格为 49 美元，通常售价为 98 美元。会员资格包括订单超过 35 美元的免费送货、免费次日和两天送货等福利 [...]
chineseContent: 您是否经常在蓝色巨人购物，或者您只是在寻找亚马逊以外的替代品？不管怎样，沃尔玛目前提供一年的 Walmart Plus 订阅服务，价格为 49 美元，通常售价为 98 美元。会员资格包括订单金额超过 35 美元的免费送货服务、Walmart.com 的免费次日和两天送货（如有）以及免费上门取货等福利。重要的是，它还可以让您提前参与促销活动，包括即将于 6 月 22 日开始、与 2026 年 Prime Day 一致的沃尔玛优惠。 [产品：Walmart Plus | https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fplus] 除了上述购物福利外，订阅还捆绑了一些其他优惠和会员资格。例如，您可以选择有广告支持的 Paramount Plus 或 Peacock，并且可以选择每 90 天切换一次。您还可以获得远程兽医护理的 Pawp 会员资格、沃尔玛和山姆会员店的汽油折扣，甚至每三个月从汉堡王购买任何商品即可免费获得一份皇堡。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
